title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 540.310 - Cannot be compelled to disclose vote
text:
540.310.  Cannot be compelled to disclose vote. — No member of a grand jury shall be obliged or allowed to testify or declare in what manner he or any other member of the grand jury voted on any question before them, or what opinions were expressed by any juror in relation to any such question.
(RSMo 1939 § 3923) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 3534; 1919 § 3879; 1909 § 5087
